name: untested-api
description: Express API with one tested file and one untested file. Skill should generate tests for the untested file matching the existing test style.

expected.description: A test file for orders.js should be created
Test for successful order creation (201 response)
Test for missing required fields (400 response)
Test for order not found (404 response)
Generated tests use vitest (matching existing test file), not jest or mocha

falsePositives.description: Should not rewrite or modify the existing users.test.js
